results.classOfGoodServiceBusinessName: The mark consists of the terms "THE GOOD DISH" in stylized lettering with the term "THE" centered above the term "GOOD", which is centered above "DISH", and with the terms inside of a broken circle comprised of a curved line above "THE GOOD" and a curved line below "DISH".

The mark consists of a thick arrow formed into a substantially complete circle with the arrow head at 4 o'clock, having the phrase "FIRST ONE" arcing along the top of the arrow, the phrase "DOESN'T COUNT" arcing along the bottom of the arrow, and a thin circle surrounding the thick arrow that is partially hidden by the two phrases.
The mark consists of the stylized wording "EASYFEET" with a punctuated frame at the corners imposed on an image of a triangle divided into two parts.

The mark consists of a stylized white wolf's head over two white crossed bones; below image, centered, in Futura Medium font in white, the words BAD WOLF, and below this, centered on above words, MEDIA.
Color is not claimed as a feature of the mark.

The mark consists of sphere with a circle around it and a half circle with a line going downward resembling a Y. Below this is the wording "YOGOFO".

The mark consists of the literal elements "DEFEND DETROIT" written in a stylized form wherein the word "DEFEND" is at the top in a curved format and the word "DETROIT" is at the bottom and between the literal elements, a rifle image is placed.
